score_components.formula_applied: No valid FLS performance to score

confidence_rationale: This video shows an educational demonstration of suturing techniques on a benchtop, not a formal FLS Task 5 performance in a laparoscopic trainer box with proper timing and evaluation criteria.
cannot_determine: Completion time - this is not a timed performance
Laparoscopic technique assessment - performed with direct hand manipulation
Formal FLS scoring criteria - this is an instructional video, not an assessment
technique_summary: This video demonstrates educational content about surgical knot tying techniques rather than a formal FLS Task 5 intracorporeal suturing performance that can be scored according to FLS criteria.
strengths: Clear demonstration of knot tying fundamentals
Educational value for learning suturing techniques
improvement_suggestions: For FLS assessment, performance must be conducted in a laparoscopic trainer box
Timing and formal evaluation criteria must be applied during the performance
